parameters.jsCode:
// Get the summary data const data = $input.first().json; const topic = data.topic || "Research Topic"; const summary = data.summary || ""; const sources = data.sources || []; const snippets = data.snippets || []; // Get current date const now = new Date(); const dateStr = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); const timeStr = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', timeZoneName: 'short' }); // Convert markdown-style formatting to HTML function formatToHtml(text) { return text .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '$1') // Bold .replace(/^• (.+)$/gm, '
  • $1
    • ') // Bullet points .replace(/^(\d+)\. (.+)$/gm, '
  • [$1] $2
    • ') // Numbered points .replace(/\n\n/g, '

    ') // Paragraphs .replace(/\n/g, '
    '); // Line breaks } const formattedSummary = formatToHtml(summary); // Build professional HTML formatted report let report = `

    RESEARCH REPORT

    Direct Source Analysis & Synthesis

    Research Topic: ${topic}

    Generated: ${dateStr} at ${timeStr}

    Sources Analyzed: ${sources.length} web sources

    Summary Length: ${data.word_count} words

    📋 EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

    ${formattedSummary}

    📚 SOURCE DETAILS

    This report synthesizes information from the following ${sources.length} verified sources:

    `; // Add sources with snippets sources.forEach((source, index) => { const num = String(index + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const snippet = snippets.find(s => s.url === source.url); report += `

    [${num}] ${source.title}

    ${source.url}

    `; if (snippet && snippet.snippet) { report += `

    "${snippet.snippet.substring(0, 200)}${snippet.snippet.length > 200 ? '...' : ''}"

    `; } if (source.date) { report += `

    Published: ${source.date}

    `; } report += `
    \n`; }); report += `

    ⚙️ METHODOLOGY

    Research Method: Direct source analysis and synthesis without AI summarization.

    Data Collection: Automated web search using SerpAPI to gather ${sources.length} relevant sources on "${topic}".

    Analysis Approach: Content extracted from search result snippets and organized thematically to provide comprehensive overview.

    Verification: All sources include direct links for reader verification and deeper exploration.

    📊 REPORT METADATA

    Report ID RPT-${now.getTime()}
    Generation Timestamp ${now.toISOString()}
    Summary Word Count ${data.word_count} words
    Total Sources ${sources.length}
    Processing Method Direct JavaScript Analysis

    ✨ This report was automatically generated by your AI Research Assistant ✨

    Direct source analysis provides unfiltered insights from collected materials.

    ━━━ END OF REPORT ━━━

    `; // Return formatted output return { json: { text: report, topic: topic, sources: sources.map(s => s.url), generated_at: now.toISOString(), word_count: data.word_count, source_count: sources.length, raw_summary: summary } };
